inputs.label: Total Wall Area
inputs.businessContext: Measured external wall area including gables but before openings.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured external wall area including gables but before openings.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Açıklıklardan önceki, üçgen çatı uçları dahil ölçülen dış duvar alanı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessene Außenwandfläche einschließlich Giebel, vor Abzügen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface mesurée des murs extérieurs, y compris les pignons, avant ouvertures.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área de pared externa medida, incluyendo hastiales pero antes de aberturas.

inputs.label: Number of Coats
inputs.businessContext: Typically 2 for new work, 1 for repaint.

businessContext_i18n.en: Typically 2 for new work, 1 for repaint.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genellikle yeni iş için 2, yeniden boyama için 1.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Généralement 2 pour les travaux neufs, 1 pour une repeinte.
businessContext_i18n.es: Normalmente 2 para obra nueva, 1 para repintado.

inputs.label: Paint Coverage Rate
inputs.businessContext: Check paint can label; varies 8-14 m²/L.

label_i18n.fr: Taux de couverture de la peinture

businessContext_i18n.en: Check paint can label; varies 8-14 m²/L.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Boya kutusu etiketini kontrol edin; 8-14 m²/L arasında değişir.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vérifier l'étiquette du pot de peinture ; varie de 8 à 14 m²/L.
businessContext_i18n.es: Consulte la etiqueta del bote; varía de 8 a 14 m²/L.

inputs.label: Waste Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Additional paint for loss, uneven surfaces, touch-ups.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional paint for loss, uneven surfaces, touch-ups.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kayıp, pürüzlü yüzeyler ve rötuşlar için ek boya.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Farbe für Verlust, unebene Flächen, Ausbesserungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Peinture supplémentaire pour pertes, surfaces irrégulières, retouches.
businessContext_i18n.es: Pintura adicional por pérdidas, superficies irregulares, retoques.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface des autres ouvertures non peignables.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área de otras aberturas no pintables.
